data.title: Wall Street Looks To Bounce Back After Friday's Rough Ride Triggered By Consumer Sentiment: Analyst Says 'We Continue To Place Our Bets' On Economy's Resilience
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose on Monday, following Friday's selloff. Futures of all four benchmark indices were trading higher.

data.title: Lucid Awards Limited Edition Lucid Air Sapphire With Lavender Finish To Winner Of Saudi Cup 2025
data.description: EV startup Lucid Motors awarded a custom Lucid Air Saphhire to the winner of the Saudi Cup over the weekend, complete with a lavender exterior.

data.title: Costco Stock Rises 1% After This Signal, Despite Market Sell-off
data.description: A significant trading signal occurred for shares of Costco (COST) on Friday, pointing to a possible uptrend in Costco stock.

data.title: Bitcoin Poised For Growth? Analyst Says 'One More Flush' Could Set Stage For Surge
data.description: Cryptocurrency analyst James Van Straten shared his optimistic perspective on Bitcoin’s (CRYPTO: BTC) ongoing market consolidation on Saturday, describing it as “bullish.”

data.title: Tesla Exec Confirms Roadster Update Talks, Collaboration With SpaceX For Top Specs
data.description: Tesla Inc executive Lars Moravy said in an interview published on Sunday that the company is indeed working with Elon Musk's rocket manufacturing company SpaceX for its upcoming Roadster vehicle.
